title: Screwlog
description: Allows you to stop log spam via the config.
body:
This mod allows you to block certain log messages by checking if they contain certain strings
In the config, the option 'blockList', which is [] by default, can be edited to include strings (messages containing which will then be blocked from the log).
The config recognizes every message to contain ""(an empty string). ``` blockList = [] #Edit this option ``` ``` blockList = ["test", "mixin", "quark-zeta"] #This will block all messages that contain "test", "mixin", OR "quark-zeta" ``` Also this is my first mod so please tell me of any errors.
